title: General Relativity
shortSummary: Curved spacetime, gravity as geometry, black holes, gravitational waves, and Einstein's masterpiece — the modern theory of gravity.
whyItMatters: General relativity describes gravity as the curvature of spacetime. It predicts black holes, gravitational lensing, and gravitational waves — all confirmed by observation. It is essential for GPS, cosmology, and our understanding of the large-scale universe.
